<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (typo, broken link, code that didn't run)
- [ ] 📝 Content improvement (clearer explanation, better example)
- [ ] ✨ New content (new example, project, prompt, or section)
- [ ] 🔧 Repo / tooling (CI, governance, infrastructure)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If I added code, it runs as documented
- [ ] If I changed model names or pricing claims, I linked the official source
- [ ] I haven't committed any secrets, API keys, or `.env` files

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->
